URL: https://github.com/kostub/iosMath

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [go] Mininglamp-OSS/octo-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mininglamp-OSS/octo-server
Language: go
🐙 The Go backend powering OCTO — an open workplace built for humans × AI agents. REST & WebSocket APIs, Lobster (AI agent) orchestration, and WuKongIM real-time messaging control plane.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zaigie/palworld-server-tool
Language: go
[中文|English|日本語]基于.sav存档解析和REST&RCON优雅地用可视化界面管理幻兽帕鲁专用服务器。/ Through parse .sav and REST&RCON, visual interface management PalWorld dedicated server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] bysiber/cleardisk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bysiber/cleardisk
Language: swift
Free macOS menu bar app to visualize and clean developer caches (Xcode, node_modules, CocoaPods, SPM, Docker, pip, Cargo). Reclaim disk space instantly.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
Language: rust
The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [rust] transact-rs/sqlx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/transact-rs/sqlx
Language: rust
🧰 The Rust SQL Toolkit. An async, pure Rust SQL crate featuring compile-time checked queries without a DSL. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [qml] liixini/skwd-wall
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/liixini/skwd-wall
Language: qml
An aesthetics-first wallpaper selector that supports images, videos and Wallpaper Engine Scenes. It can generate matugen themes from these sources as well! Also has a built in Wallhaven.cc & Steam browser because why not.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [kotlin] AurelioB/ClusterTune
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AurelioB/ClusterTune
Language: kotlin
ClusterTune is an Android utility for tuning CPU frequency limits on supported handheld devices. It lets you adjust CPU clusters, save performance profiles, and access quick controls from an Android Quick Settings tile.
